prompt: Create an accessible search component that uses SvelteKit remote functions to query the server. It should debounce input, show loading state with aria-busy, announce results to screen readers with a live region, and support keyboard navigation through results.

assertions.text: Has a .remote.ts file using query() from '$app/server'
Has aria-live region for announcing results
Uses aria-busy attribute on loading state
Has a labeled search input (label element or aria-label)
